scripts.dev: if [ ! -f /.dockerenv ]; then echo '\n❌ Do not run dev locally. Use: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build\n' && exit 1; fi && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @orr/api" "npm run dev -w @orr/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @orr/shared && npm run build -w @orr/api && npm run build -w @orr/web
